chunks.title: Wisdom and the King's Authority
chunks.reason: A cohesive unit advising submission to royal authority while acknowledging human limitations.

chunks.title: The Injustice of Life Under the Sun
chunks.reason: An observation on the unpredictability of fate and the apparent reversal of justice.

chunks.title: The Value of Joy and Limits of Wisdom
chunks.reason: A concluding reflection on finding joy in labor and the limits of human understanding.
